summary: Host routing & capability gating map (extension/src, TypeScript). Per-form engine routing is decided in designerEditor.ts fullRender→resolveRouting: an explicit control-source override wins (detectEngineKind on the dll: presence of .deps.json/.runtimeconfig.json sidecar → 'modern', absence → 'net48'); otherwise findOwningCsproj + resolveFrameworkOutput auto-detects a Framework build (single-target net4x with no build → frameworkUnbuilt prompt instead of a garbage render; multi-target stays net9 with a later T1.3 'switch to framework preview' offer on unresolved vendor types). The GetCapabilities handshake exists (both engines implement it) but is INFORMATIONAL ONLY — consumed solely by the diagnostics-report command; actual UI affordance gating is structural, via ~45 `engineKind === 'net48'` branches in designerEditor.ts plus per-result flags (applied/diagnostics, itemProps.editable, isTabHost, vendorTags) that the webviews (panel.js itemRO/currentItemEditable, designer.js tab verbs) interpret. Every persisted edit is a net9 text splice through the single commit() funnel regardless of engine; on net48 the picture is then mirrored by a live-mutation RPC (live48/show48 funnel + 9 typed helpers: liveEdit48, liveReset48, liveCollection48, liveStringArray48, liveTreeNodes48, liveToolStrip48, setCompiledImageListLive, applyCompiledEdits, addCompiledControl/removeCompiledControls/setCompiledZOrder), with honest previewPartial status when applied===false. Undo/redo/revert calls discardCompiledLive so the cached compiled instance can't keep showing the undone edit. composeFormNotice posts an UNCONDITIONAL 'last build' ℹ️ disclosure on every net48 render (precedence in formNotice.ts: localizable 🔒 > compiledPreview ℹ️ > binaryResx ⚠️ > inheritedBase ⚠️), with dirty/clean wording kept in sync at commit()/postDirty/rerenderFromDoc. extension.ts owns the net48 process lifecycle: pinned-output refcounting by output DIRECTORY (net48OutputKey), releaseNet48OutputIfUnused on dispose, the Release-for-Rebuild command (releaseAllCompiledAssemblies with 5s timeout → recycle), recycleNet48Engine with net48Blocked fail-closed latch, probeDirs config injection, and a dev/bundled exe resolver. csprojRef.ts supplies projectTargetFramework/isFrameworkTfm/multiTargetHasFramework/resolveFrameworkOutput/resolveFrameworkOnlyOutput. Tab-strip ops (tabClick/tabRename/addTab/deleteTab) and vendor smart tags are net48-ONLY today (net9 legs stubbed 'future parity'). Notably NOT net48-routed: all typed collection/tree/strip READ+SPLICE paths (pure-text → always the modern engine, even on net48 forms) and the ImageList binary ImageStream (de)serialization, which uses the net48 engine as a service for ALL projects including pure net9.
keyFacts: ROUTING: designerEditor.ts:118-124 detectEngineKind(assemblyPath) — .deps.json/.runtimeconfig.json sidecar beside the dll => 'modern', absent => 'net48'; no assembly => 'modern'. Mirrored engine-agnostically by csprojRef.ts isFrameworkBuild (~L208).

ROUTING: designerEditor.ts:1852-1874 resolveRouting(explicitAsm): explicit override => detectEngineKind(it); else findOwningCsproj (handles shared-project .shproj forms via wsRoot bound) + resolveFrameworkOutput; Framework output found => {kind:'net48', asm}; single-target net4x TFM with NOTHING built => {kind:'net48', asm:undefined, frameworkUnbuilt:true} (fullRender then prompts instead of rendering, designerEditor.ts:1624-1632); everything else => net9 with engine-side auto-discovery.

ROUTING: fullRender (designerEditor.ts:1598-1718) re-routes EVERY render: sets this.engineKind from route, drops cached toolbox on a kind flip, renders via renderCompiledWithLayout (net48, 20s timeout) vs renderWithLayout(text) (net9) — note net48 render takes NO source text (renders last build), net9 takes the unsaved buffer.

CAPABILITY HANDSHAKE IS INFORMATIONAL-ONLY: engineClient.ts:728-741 EngineCapabilities {engine, render, edit, livePreviewUnsavedEdits, runtime, notes} via 'GetCapabilities' RPC; its ONLY consumer is the diagnostics-report command extension.ts:294-298 (loop over both kinds at extension.ts:305). NO UI affordance is gated by it — gating is structural via engineKind branches + per-message flags. The task premise 'GetCapabilities → disable affordances' does not match the code.

ACTUAL UI GATING net48: (a) per-result flags on CompiledRenderRaw (engineClient.ts:340-355): applied?/diagnostics? => show48 posts t('status.previewPartial') when applied===false (designerEditor.ts:2502-2507); liveInstanceId/liveBuildId are diagnostic-only (divergence lock descoped); (b) itemProps.editable = component!=null (designerEditor.ts:1983-1986) => panel.js currentItemEditable/itemRO (panel.js:330-331,1622-1667) forces read-only item grid + hides complex sub-rows + greys Reset (panel.js:443-446) only when the net48 assembly is unbuilt; (c) isTabHost flag (engineClient.ts:262) => designer.js:1060-1066 gates addTab/deleteTab verbs, :1522-1545 routes header clicks, :1580 blocks drag on tab host; (d) vendorTags [] on net9 explicitly to clear stale menus (designerEditor.ts:1917-1920).

EXHAUSTIVE engineKind==='net48' BRANCH LIST designerEditor.ts (the surface that collapses on parity): L906 dispose→releaseNet48OutputIfUnused (unpin build output); L944 isCompiledPreview getter; L979 pinnedNet48Output getter; L1014+1010-1024 loadToolboxItems merged toolbox (net9 framework FQNs + net48 vendor via listCompiledToolboxControls) with kind-flip race guard; L1231 rerenderFromDoc→discardCompiledLive on undo/redo/revert (drop stale live instance); L1651 fullRender render-RPC choice; L1737 composeFormNotice unconditional 'last build' disclosure; L1885 loadProps→describeCompiledComponent + concurrent vendorTagsFor; L1964 loadItemProps item describe on live instance; L2068/2081 manipulate(single-drag) describeFor+live48 applyCompiledEdits; L2144/2157 group-move live48; L2188 group-resize live48; L2216 multi-remove live48 removeCompiledControls; L2357 applyEdit→liveEdit48 (vs patchOrRerender); L2434 applyItemEdit→liveEdit48 on item (vs fullRender(true)); L2531 describeFor net48 branch; L2779+2846 editImageListImages describe-check + setCompiledImageListLive mirror; L2921 resetFromGrid→liveReset48; L2953 resetItemFromGrid→liveReset48; L3073 string Items editor→liveCollection48; L3134 string[] editor→liveStringArray48; L3194 ListView.Columns→liveCollection48; L3252 TreeView.Nodes→liveTreeNodes48; L3340 applyToolStripItems→liveToolStrip48 (returns freshness for ADD auto-reopen); L3594 DataGridView.Columns→liveCollection48; L3637 batch multi-prop edit→live48 applyCompiledEdits; L3881-3896 applyDropControl: addAsm=undefined + projectFqns handed to net9 pure-text splice, live48 addCompiledControl, and SKIP maybeOfferProjectReference (vendor controls live in the form's own assembly); L4000 removeControl→live48; L4073/4082-4086 paste live-instantiates clones + net48Stale status when asm missing; L4130/4139 duplicate ditto; L4182 z-order→live48 setCompiledZOrder; L4194 applyTabClick net48-ONLY guard ('net9 tab-switching is a future parity item'); L4209 applyTabRename net48-ONLY; L4233 applyAddTab net48-ONLY; L4259 applyDeleteTab net48-ONLY; L4300 postDirty→composeFormNotice({}) resyncs banner clean/dirty wording.

LIVE-MIRROR FUNNEL: designerEditor.ts show48 (L2488-2509, freshness/seq-gated canvas paint + previewPartial honesty) and live48 (L2512-2526, ensureEngine('net48') + op + show48; errors degrade to status, NEVER block editing — source already committed by net9 splice). Typed helpers: liveEdit48 L2447, liveCollection48 L2458, liveStringArray48 L2468, liveTreeNodes48 L2478, liveReset48 L2970, liveToolStrip48 L3367 (resolves fresh item forest from committed text first).

TEXT-IS-TRUTH INVARIANT: every persisted edit — both engines — is a net9 Roslyn splice through the single commit() funnel (designerEditor.ts:1145-1215) with byte-local firewall (isByteLocalEdit; comment L1152-1157: 'net48 never writes source — it persists the SAME net9 splice'), renderOk gate, baselineUnknown gate, localizable gate. net48 branch only affects the PICTURE refresh after commit.

UNDO/REDO RECONCILE: rerenderFromDoc (designerEditor.ts:1218-1244) — postDirty first (banner wording before stallable RPCs), then on net48 discardCompiledLive('DiscardCompiledLive' RPC, engineClient.ts:614-621) best-effort, then fullRender. Rationale: net48 renders the live compiled INSTANCE, which still carries the undone live mutation.

COMPOSE FORM NOTICE: designerEditor.ts:1727-1760 — net48Preview = engineKind==='net48' feeds chooseFormNoticeKind (formNotice.ts:20-28, pure/unit-tested): localizable(🔒) > compiledPreview(ℹ️) > binaryResx(⚠️) > inheritedBase(⚠️); message text appends EVERY true condition (single-slot banner never hides a lower-precedence disclosure); dirty vs clean wording via t('designer.notice.compiledPreviewDirty'|'compiledPreview'); posted SYNCHRONOUSLY right after render/layout/tray posts (codex descope-review #2: no disclosure-free window if loadProps stalls).

CROSS-RUNTIME T1.3 OFFER: designerEditor.ts maybePromptForControlSource→maybeOfferFrameworkPreview (L1788-1806): only when auto-routed net9 (engineKind==='modern', no explicit asm) AND render returned 'unresolved type X' AND csproj multiTargetHasFramework (csprojRef.ts:192-200, comment-stripped TargetFrameworks with >1 entry incl net4x); resolveFrameworkOnlyOutput built => showWarningMessage offer => switchToFrameworkPreview (L1817-1830: existsSync re-check, setAssemblyOverride persists to workspaceState, reloadControlSource re-routes); output NOT built => frameworkUnbuiltNotice. One-shot per form (promptedForSource latch).

PIN/RELEASE REFCOUNT: net48OutputKey = normalized output DIRECTORY (designerEditor.ts:136-138) — matches engine's per-bin-dir AppDomain granularity; DesignerHub.net48OutputsInUse L350-357, releaseNet48OutputIfUnused L367-379 (skips if any open session still renders that dir; fire-and-forget); session.dispose L897-910 releases after unregisterSession; reloadControlSource L961-974 releases the PRIOR output captured by the CALLER before the override mutation (codex R7-6; pinnedNet48Output getter L976-980); selectControlAssembly captures it at extension.ts:583-588.

NET48 ENGINE LIFECYCLE extension.ts: getEngine L406-503 — net48-specific: await in-flight net48Recycling then fail-closed throw if net48Blocked (L410-412); probeDirs passed only for net48 (L439); onLost with confirmedExit=false on mere RPC-close triggers recycleNet48Engine BEFORE recovery + late-exit recoverOnce path (L479-495) because a closed RPC does not prove the process (and its dll pins) died.

RELEASE-FOR-REBUILD COMMAND: extension.ts releaseFrameworkAssemblies L641-679 ('winformsDesigner.releaseAssembly', registered L195-197, deliberately NOT gated to a focused designer): asks the ENGINE (releaseAllCompiledAssemblies, engineClient.ts:647-658) not the host's in-use list (a source-switched session silently forgets its old pin); 5s Promise.race timeout => reportRecycle; result.failed>0 (AppDomain refused unload) => recycle; never starts an engine just to release. releaseNet48Output impl L593-622 (per-dir 'ReleaseCompiledAssembly', engineClient.ts:625-640).

RECYCLE: extension.ts recycleNet48Engine/doRecycleNet48 L697-729 — shared in-flight promise (net48Recycling), kills the EXACT captured handle (map unreliable after onLost), checks exitCode/signalCode BEFORE listening (stale-listener hang), net48Blocked=true until a REAL exit event lands (3s dispose + 2s SIGKILL deadlines); net48Blocked latches getEngine('net48') fail-closed indefinitely if exit never confirms.

ENGINE SPAWN: extension.ts resolveEngineEntry L793-801 — net48 = native .exe: dev Release then Debug (engine-net48/bin/{Release,Debug}/net48/WinFormsDesigner.Engine.Net48.exe) then bundled (engine-net48/ in VSIX); probeDirs config 'winformsDesigner.net48.probeDirectories' (L757-770, read once per engine START) delivered via env var (engineClient.ts:28-45 mirrors Program.ProbeDirsEnvVar).

engineClient.ts NET48-SPECIFIC RPCs (26): RenderCompiledDesigner(:397 renderCompiledWithLayout), DescribeCompiledComponent(:453), ListCompiledVendorSmartTags(:468), SetCompiledPropertyLive(:478), ResetCompiledPropertyLive(:490), SetCompiledCollectionLive(:515), SetCompiledTreeNodesLive(:528), SetCompiledToolStripItemsLive(:542), SetCompiledStringArrayLive(:558), SerializeImageList(:578), DeserializeImageList(:596), SetCompiledImageListLive(:602), DiscardCompiledLive(:614), ReleaseCompiledAssembly(:625), ReleaseAllCompiledAssemblies(:647), ApplyCompiledEdits(:661 batch), RemoveCompiledControls(:674), SetCompiledZOrder(:684), SwitchCompiledTab(:694), HitTestCompiledTab(:705), AddCompiledControl(:716), ListCompiledToolboxControls(:1054), AddCompiledTabPage(:1070), RemoveCompiledTabPage(:1080); plus GetCapabilities(:739, both engines) and CompiledRenderRaw fields applied/diagnostics/liveInstanceId/liveBuildId(:340-355).

csprojRef.ts FRAMEWORK RESOLUTION: projectTargetFramework(:172-179), isFrameworkTfm(:181-184, /^net(2|3|4)\d?\d?$/), multiTargetHasFramework(:192-200), isFrameworkBuild(:208-213 sidecar-absence), collectBuildOutputs(:217-243, <AssemblyName>.exe|dll under bin/ depth 4, freshest-first, framework-tagged), resolveFrameworkOutput(:250-252 freshest overall — covers OutputType=Exe), resolveFrameworkOnlyOutput(:260-262 freshest FRAMEWORK-flavored output even when a net9 output is newer — the T1.3 pick).

SELECT-ASSEMBLY FALLBACK: extension.ts:565-570 — net9 engine's ResolveAssembly returns null by design for a net4x project; host falls back to resolveFrameworkOutput so a Framework control source resolves. Status-bar badge extension.ts:71-92: isCompiledPreview => previewBadge + tooltip note; informational NOT a lock (former $(lock) removed after codex review).

NOT net48-branched (survives parity): all typed collection/tree/strip/gridcolumn READ+SPLICE paths route to ensureEngine('modern') even on net48 forms (pure-text Roslyn, e.g. designerEditor.ts:3053,3114,3175,3233,3306,3408,3463,3488,3529,3575 — T1.1 resolved the old hard-blocks); ImageList ImageStream binary (de)serialization uses the net48 engine as a SERVICE for ALL projects incl. pure net9 (designerEditor.ts:2762-2846, engineClient.ts:578-600); commit() byte-local funnel; LOCALIZABLE_BLOCKED message gate (L160-176) engine-agnostic; handleEngineCrash generic over kind (L913-930).

'capability preflight' in the 0.12.0 sense is a DIFFERENT mechanism from GetCapabilities: previewSave/SavePreview.reasonCategory (engineClient.ts:843-880, values safe|localizable|binaryResx|unresolvedType|lostStatements|unrepresentable) — the authoritative save-safety signal, net9-side, engine-agnostic in the host.

NET48-ONLY FEATURES with net9 stubs marked 'future': tab switching/rename/add/delete (designerEditor.ts:4194,4209,4233,4259 early-return unless net48) and vendor smart-tag Tasks menus (vendorTagsFor L1941-1955, VENDOR_VERBS map AddTabPage/RemoveTabPage/TabPages→ existing source-first verbs; vendor's own action deliberately never invoked — would mutate a live graph nothing persists + modal dialogs would hang the STA engine).

TOOLBOX ON net48: merged enumeration (loadToolboxItems L1003-1032) = net9 listToolboxItems framework palette (same FQNs droppable) + net48 listCompiledToolboxControls vendor/project controls the net9 ALC can't load; capture-kind race guard prevents a stale framework-only list poisoning the net48 cache across the modern→net48 first-render flip.

TEST SURFACE: extension/src/e2e.ts has ~193 net48 references (cross-runtime CLI legs: item describe/edit parity, timer live-edit SAFETY leg, tray items, GROW nested add); formNotice.test.ts pins banner precedence; webview-e2e.ts ~6. docs/maps/property-editor-pipeline.md + oncanvas-toolstrip-pipeline.md hold net48 engine-side anchors (spot-checked, consistent); docs/plans/vs-parity-completion-plan.md T1.1/T1.3/T2.2 anchors partially STALE (T1.1 collection hard-blocks at designerEditor.ts:1573+ since fixed via pure-text reads).

files.role: Session hub + per-form routing (detectEngineKind:118, resolveRouting:1852, fullRender:1598), all ~45 engineKind==='net48' branches, show48/live48 mirror funnel (2488/2512) + 9 typed live helpers, commit() funnel + rerenderFromDoc discardCompiledLive (1227-1243), composeFormNotice (1727), T1.3 switch offer (1788-1830), net48OutputKey/pin-release refcount (136, 350-379), tab ops (4185-4290)

RPC layer: 26 net48-specific Compiled* RPCs (397-726, 1054-1087), GetCapabilities handshake (728-741), CompiledRenderRaw applied/diagnostics/liveInstanceId/liveBuildId flags (340-355), probeDirs env plumbing (28-45), previewSave reasonCategory capability-preflight (843-880)

Engine process lifecycle: getEngine net48 recycle-wait/net48Blocked fail-closed (406-439), onLost unconfirmed-exit recycle (479-495), selectControlAssembly framework fallback + priorNet48Output capture (555-590), releaseNet48Output/releaseFrameworkAssemblies/reportRecycle/recycleNet48Engine (593-729), probeDirs config (757-770), resolveEngineEntry net48 exe (793-801), preview status-bar badge (67-100), diagnostics GetCapabilities report (294-305)

Framework output resolution: projectTargetFramework/isFrameworkTfm/multiTargetHasFramework (172-200), isFrameworkBuild sidecar check (208), collectBuildOutputs bin-walk (217-243), resolveFrameworkOutput/resolveFrameworkOnlyOutput (250-262)
Pure banner-precedence chooser: localizable > compiledPreview(net48) > binaryResx > inheritedBase (unit-tested in formNotice.test.ts)
Crash-loop guard shared by both engine kinds (RecoverableEngineKind = 'modern' | 'net48')
Properties webview: itemRO/currentItemEditable gating (330, 1622-1667), item Reset greying (443-446) — the net48-unbuilt placeholder consumer of itemProps.editable
Canvas webview: isTabHost verb gating + tab-header click routing (1060-1066, 1522-1545, 1580, 1890), vendor Tasks flyout (2035) — consumers of net48-only affordance flags
CLI e2e harness with ~193 net48 references — cross-runtime parity legs (item describe/edit, timer safety, tray, tab ops)
Existing durable map (reused): net48 CompiledDescriber/TryApply engine-side anchors

Aspirational plan: T1.1 net48 collection parity (since done via pure-text routing — anchors stale), T1.3 cross-runtime routing (done), T2.2 load-failure UX (open), T3 engine-authoritative layer (triggered)
Aspirational long-form designer plan (harvested; net48 two-engine architecture rationale)

portBlockers: The 'text-is-truth / picture-best-effort' contract is load-bearing everywhere: if net48 ever gains live-SOURCE rendering (interpreting the buffer like net9), all ~45 engineKind==='net48' branches in designerEditor.ts collapse into the net9 path — but the collapse is safe only because every one of them is strictly a POST-COMMIT picture mirror; none writes source. The single risky coupling is liveToolStrip48/applyToolStripItems' freshness return feeding the ADD auto-reopen (designerEditor.ts:3337-3345).

GetCapabilities is NOT wired to any gating today — any plan that adds engine capabilities (e.g. livePreviewUnsavedEdits=true on a future net48) must first build the missing consumer plumbing; nothing will change behavior automatically.

Assembly pinning is inherent to instantiating compiled types, not to the routing: even a source-rendering net48 engine still loads the user's vendor dlls, so the whole pin/release/recycle/net48Blocked machinery (extension.ts:593-729, hub refcount) SURVIVES parity and cannot be deleted with the branches.

net48-ONLY features would need net9 counterparts before branch collapse: tab switch/rename/add/delete (net9 legs explicitly stubbed 'future', designerEditor.ts:4194-4259), vendor smart tags (need the real compiled type), merged toolbox vendor enumeration, describeCompiledComponent-based manipFor semantics.

The unconditional compiledPreview disclosure (composeFormNotice + formNotice.ts precedence + dirty-wording sync at 3 sites: commit L1193, rerenderFromDoc L1223, postDirty L4296) is a 1.0 trust-floor commitment — removing it requires proving render==source, i.e. the exact divergence lock that was descoped (codex decision A).

ImageList editor's dependency on the net48 engine is runtime-intrinsic (BinaryFormatter ImageStream needs .NET Framework) — it is a cross-cutting SERVICE dependency for pure net9 projects too, so the net48 engine binary must ship in the VSIX regardless of routing decisions.
risks: Stale-anchor risk: line numbers cited are against the current uncommitted working tree (heavy modifications on master per git status); the docs/maps README convention (spot-check 2-3 anchors) applies to this map too.
docs/plans/vs-parity-completion-plan.md anchors are partially outdated (T1.1 hard-block lines no longer exist; T1.3 is implemented) — do not plan from it without diffing against the code.

net48Blocked can latch getEngine('net48') fail-closed indefinitely if a wedged engine process never emits exit — by design (honest lock-state), but a months-scale plan touching lifecycle should preserve this invariant (codex R8-5).

The webview affordance gating (itemRO, isTabHost verbs) lives in un-typechecked media/*.js and is kept in sync with host flags only by webview-e2e tests — a routing refactor that changes flag names silently breaks gating.

loadToolboxItems' capture-kind race guard (designerEditor.ts:1010-1024) and show48's seq gating are subtle concurrency invariants; several past codex-confirmed bugs lived exactly here — treat as high-regression-risk zones in any port.
